devirFcrReport.description: Shows starting quantity, sales, mortality, remaining stock and FCR from the first day of the selected projects to today.
devirFcrReport.loadFailed: Cycle / FCR report could not be loaded.
devirFcrReport.emptyState: Select at least one project to see the report.
devirFcrReport.pendingState: Select projects and press the get report button.

summary.openingFishDescription: Live stock at the opening of the period.
summary.shipmentFishDescription: Total units shipped during the period.
summary.endingFishDescription: Live stock at the end of the period.

devirFcrReport.tableDescription: Full-period summary for the selected projects between {{fromDate}} and {{toDate}}.
